programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom
programme.desc: The second of the Lucas/Spielberg Indiana Jones epics is set a year or so before the events in Raiders of the Lost Ark. Indy needs to retrieve a precious gem and several kidnapped young boys on behalf of a remote East Indian village. This time he teams up with a night club singer and a 12-year old boy.

rating.system: Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade
programme.desc: An art collector appeals to Jones to embark on a search for the Holy Grail. He learns that another archaeologist has disappeared while searching for the precious goblet, and the missing man is his own father, Dr. Henry Jones. The artifact is much harder to find than they expected, and its powers are too much for those impure in heart.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull
programme.desc: It's the height of the Cold War, and famous archaeologist Indiana Jones (Harrison Ford), returning from his latest adventure, finds out his job at Marshall College is in jeopardy. He meets Mutt (Shia La Beouf), a young man who wants Indy to help him find the legendary Crystal Skull of Akator, and the pair set out for Peru. However, deadly agent Irina Spalko (Cate Blanchett) is searching for the powerful artifact, too, because the Soviets believe it can help them conquer the world.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Inside
programme.desc: A high-end art thief becomes trapped inside a luxury, high-tech penthouse in New York's Times Square after his heist doesn't go as planned. Locked inside with nothing but priceless works of art, he must use all his cunning and invention to survive.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A shy man becomes obsessed with a tiny doll that's inanimate to everyone but him. With Robert Duvall.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A desperate newspaper editor hires the devil (Burgess Meredith) to save his failing business. With Patricia Crowley.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A teacher returns to her apartment to find a child waiting for her.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: NEW! Shark PowerDetect with DuoClean Detect Technology
programme.desc: Meet the new Shark PowerDetect Upright Vacuum with features like DuoClean Detect Technology, self-cleaning brush roll and odor neutralizing, and you will be cleaning faster, smarter and better!

programme.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Three astronauts land on a strange planet and meet its caretaker.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An astronaut (Roddy McDowall) experiences martian hospitality.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: The manager of a baseball team on a losing streak hires a robot pitcher called Casey.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Hellboy
programme.desc: While battling a trio of rampaging giants, the legendary half-demon Hellboy encounters Nimue the Blood Queen, an ancient resurrected sorceress who's out to avenge a past betrayal. Suddenly caught in a clash between the supernatural and the human, Hellboy soon becomes hell-bent on stopping Nimue without triggering the end of the world.

programme.desc: Not related to the previous Leprechaun films. Two young couples backpacking through Ireland discover that one of Ireland's most famous legends is a terrifying reality.

programme.desc: A monster named Larry manifests itself through smart phones and mobile devices. Feature film version of the 2017 short film.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull
programme.desc: It's the height of the Cold War, and famous archaeologist Indiana Jones (Harrison Ford), returning from his latest adventure, finds out his job at Marshall College is in jeopardy. He meets Mutt (Shia La Beouf), a young man who wants Indy to help him find the legendary Crystal Skull of Akator, and the pair set out for Peru. Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Leprechaun
programme.desc: Dan O'Grady (Shay Duffin) steals 100 gold coins from a leprechaun (Warwick Davis) while on vacation in Ireland. The leprechaun follows him home, but Dan locks the murderous midget in a crate, held at bay by a four-leaf clover. Ten years later, J.D. Redding (John Sanderford) and his daughter, Tory (Jennifer Aniston), rent O'Grady's property for the summer. When their new neighbors accidentally release the leprechaun, he goes on a murderous rampage to reclaim his gold.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: The team must find assailants who illegally crossed the border and attacked California Highway Patrol officers; Homeland Security sends Nell's older and bossy sister to assist with the case.

programme.desc: Callen and the team question Joelle's backstory after she escapes from a kidnapping and turns to Callen for help.

programme.desc: The team tracks a highly-skilled assailant determined to avenge her father's death by killing a Brazilian diplomat.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: The team investigates a ransomware attack that disrupts the entire power grid and paralyzes the city; Sam struggles to find a way for his family to celebrate the holidays after his wife's death.

programme.desc: After napalm is detected at a crime scene, the team investigates the sole casualty for possible links to terrorism.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: Hetty is being tortured by her captors in Vietnam; Eric and Nell find a clue to her whereabouts; the team organizes a rescue mission.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: NCIS joins Hetty's team from the Vietnam War in a dangerous rescue mission to save Hetty from her captors in Vietnam; Mosley calls in Nell's sister to assist the team in Los Angeles with processing evidence connected to Hetty's time in Vietnam.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: Callen and Sam pull Granger's daughter, former spy Jennifer Kim, from witness protection to help the team locate a spy who has obtained an arsenal of bomb materials.

programme.title: Leprechaun: Origins
programme.desc: Not related to the previous Leprechaun films. Two young couples backpacking through Ireland discover that one of Ireland's most famous legends is a terrifying reality.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Leprechaun 4 in Space
programme.desc: Resurfacing on an alien planet, the Leprechaun (Warwick Davis) abducts a member of the world's royalty, Princess Zarina (Rebekah Carlton), in an attempt to wed her and become the supreme ruler. Unfortunately for the diminutive schemer, well-armed soldiers arrive to foil his plans. Not easily defeated, however, the feisty Leprechaun continues to battle the warriors while also contending with the warped scientist known as Dr. Mittenhand (Guy Siner).

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Leprechaun in the Hood
programme.desc: When aspiring hip-hop performers Butch (Red Grant), Postmaster P. (Anthony Montgomery) and Stray Bullet (Rashaan Nall) cross record producer Mack Daddy (Ice-T), their grudge against him leads to their own peril. After they break into Mack Daddy's home and swipe an ancient medallion from a grotesque statue, the evil Leprechaun (Warwick Davis) is freed from his magical prison. Soon the sinister little man is on the trail of Butch, Postmaster P. and Stray Bullet, along with Mack Daddy himself.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
